regions.text: What is this man doing? He is putting paint on the door. He is painting the door. He is a painter. That is his work.
This is his paint. This is his brush. He puts the paint on with his paint brush.
2 + 2 = 4. 3 + 7 = 10. 14 + 26 = 40. This is addition. The boy is doing addition. That is his work.
This is a bank. This is a check. Bank of Middletown fifteen dollars $15 John Jones
